archive_data.question_text: Annapurna Finance Private Limited had its origin as a not-for-profit company called __________, an NGO that helped poor women in Odisha.

explanation.english: Annapurna Finance Private Limited was originally established as a not-for-profit company named All India Development Trust, an NGO that worked for the welfare of poor women in Odisha before transitioning into a microfinance institution.
explanation.tanglish: Annapurna Finance Private Limited, All India Development Trust endra peyaril oru not-for-profit company aaga thodakkappattadhu. Idhu Odisha maanilathil eliya vittavasigalukku udhavu seidha oru NGO aagi irundhadhu, pinbu oru siriya nidhi sevai institution aaga marindhadhu.

explanation.english: Hanukkah is an eight-day Jewish festival commemorating the rededication of the Second Temple in Jerusalem during the second century BC. It is also known as the Festival of Lights.
explanation.tanglish: Hanukkah enbadhu yahoodhar samayathin eitunaaiaadha pandigai. Idhu kristhu pirappukku munbu Jerusalemil irundha second kovil punar samarpitham seithathai ninaivu paduthum oru eetu naal pandigai. Idhai Vilakkugal Thiruvizha endrum solluvaargal.

archive_data.question_text: In which year did Mihir Sen create history by being the only man to swim the five oceans in one calendar year?

explanation.english: Mihir Sen created history in 1966 by becoming the first and only person to swim the five oceans (including Palk Strait, Suez Canal, Strait of Gibraltar, Dardanelles, and Bosphorus) in a single calendar year.
explanation.tanglish: Mihir Sen 1966 maa varushathil oru kalathinarumagiya aandil aindhu kadalugalil neenthi varalaru padaitaar. Palk Kadanthai, Suez Canal, Gibraltar Kadanthai, Dardanelles, matrum Bosphorus endra ivatrai neenthi adhaiyum oru varushathil mudithavar.

explanation.english: The question text for this matching question was not provided in the source document. Only the answer options were visible.
explanation.tanglish: Indha saya viral kelviyin patham kodukkappattulla documentil illai. Sirupataiyaana pathi mattume therindhadhu. Sariyaana virupam source document mattumeyam kandupidikka mudiyavillai.

archive_data.question_text: Which edition of the FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup was hosted by India in 2022?

explanation.english: India hosted the 7th edition of the FIFA U-17 Women's World Cup in 2022. The tournament was held from October 11 to October 30, 2022, across three venues.
explanation.tanglish: India 2022 maa varushathil FIFA U-17 Pengalulagam Cup in 7th edition naadaga vaithadhu. Idhu October 11 mudhal October 30 varai moondru idangalil nadatha pattadhu.

archive_data.question_text: According to Planning commission of India (2011-12), which group of states has the highest poverty ratio?

explanation.english: According to the Planning Commission of India based on the Tendulkar Committee methodology for 2011-12, Chhattisgarh and Jharkhand had among the highest poverty ratios in India.
explanation.tanglish: India Ellai Nadu Aayogathin Tendulkar kuzhu muraiyai (2011-12) eetrupadi, Chhattisgarh matrum Jharkhand maanilanggallil eeriayalaatchi thogai athigamaaga irundhadhu.
